name: AI Podcast Generator
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure AI Speech
services.purpose: Multi-speaker voice synthesis — distinct neural voices per host/guest, SSML prosody control for natural conversation flow, emotion injection (excitement, curiosity, emphasis), pronunciation lexicons for domain terminology, audio output in broadcast-quality 48kHz WAV

enterprise.note: Custom voice clones, 200M+ characters/month, brand voices

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for podcast content generation — article-to-conversation transformation, multi-speaker dialogue scripting with natural banter, segment transition writing, show notes and chapter summaries, audience Q&A segment generation, topic research synthesis

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Audio asset management — generated episode audio files (WAV/MP3/AAC), music transition clips, intro/outro jingles, speaker voice profiles, raw and mastered audio tracks, podcast RSS feed media files

services.name: Azure CDN
services.purpose: Global podcast distribution — low-latency audio file delivery to podcast players worldwide, RSS feed caching, episode download acceleration, bandwidth optimization for streaming playback

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Podcast production pipeline — content ingestion and preprocessing, script generation orchestration, multi-speaker audio synthesis coordination, audio post-processing (mixing, transitions, normalization), RSS feed generation, chapter marker embedding

enterprise.note: 8 vCPU, dedicated compute, parallel episode production

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Speech service keys, OpenAI API credentials, CDN management secrets, storage account keys, podcast platform API tokens (Apple Podcasts, Spotify)

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Production pipeline health — episode generation latency, voice synthesis quality scores, audio processing throughput, CDN cache hit rates, download analytics, listener engagement metrics

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for initial script drafts and show notes generation — reserve GPT-4o for final dialogue polish, natural banter injection, and complex multi-speaker conversation flow, saving 60% on AI content costs

Implement audio asset caching in Blob Storage — music transitions, intro/outro jingles, and speaker voice profiles are reused across episodes; cache synthesized audio segments for common phrases to avoid re-synthesis
Use Blob Storage lifecycle management — move episodes older than 90 days to cool tier and older than 1 year to archive tier; most podcast downloads occur within the first 30 days of release

Optimize CDN costs with intelligent caching rules — set 7-day TTL for recent episodes (high download volume) and 30-day TTL for archive episodes; compress audio with appropriate bitrate (128kbps MP3 for standard, 256kbps for premium)

Batch episode production during off-peak hours — voice synthesis and audio mixing are not time-sensitive for scheduled podcasts; nightly batch processing on Functions consumption plan saves 80% vs. premium plan
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
